summary: Comprehensive testing of Goals & Period Comparison feature and backend refactoring. All 21 backend tests passed. Frontend testing confirms salesperson has 4 tabs (Dashboard, Follow-ups, Goals, Data) while admin has 3 tabs (Overview, Salespeople, All Data). Goals tab shows progress rings when goals are set and Period Comparison with delta indicators. All existing features continue to work after backend refactoring.

issues: Console warning: Recharts chart width/height -1 when component renders before container size is determined. Known minor Recharts issue that doesn't affect functionality.

passed_tests: Backend: Root API /api/ accessible after refactoring
Backend: Auth routes (auth_routes.py) working - /api/auth/login, /api/auth/me
Backend: Admin routes (admin.py) working - /api/admin/salespeople, /api/admin/comparison
Backend: Pipeline routes (pipeline.py) working - /api/followup/actions
Backend: Dashboard KPIs endpoint working - /api/dashboard/kpis
Backend: POST /api/goals saves goal correctly
Backend: GET /api/goals returns saved goal
Backend: GET /api/goals returns defaults when no goal set
Backend: POST /api/goals updates existing goal (upsert)
Backend: GET /api/goals/comparison returns correct structure (current, previous, goal)
Backend: Comparison current KPIs have all required fields
Backend: Comparison previous period data returned when available
Backend: Comparison goal data included in response
Backend: Comparison returns 400 for invalid pay period
Backend: First pay period has no previous (null)
Backend: Salesperson has correct role
Backend: Admin has correct role
Backend: Any authenticated user can set their own goals
Backend: Salesperson cannot access /admin/comparison (403)
Backend: Goal data persists across requests
Backend: Goal in comparison matches saved goal
Frontend: Salesperson has 4 tabs (Dashboard, Follow-ups, Goals, Data)
Frontend: Admin has 3 tabs (Overview, Salespeople, All Data) - NO Goals tab
Frontend: Admin does NOT have Follow-ups tab (correct)
Frontend: Goals tab shows 'My Goals' section with progress rings
Frontend: Goals tab shows 'Period Comparison' section with delta indicators
Frontend: Edit Goals button opens goal form
Frontend: Goal form has revenue, deals, commission inputs with data-testid
Frontend: Save Goals button works and updates rings
Frontend: Goals tab shows 'Select a pay period' when All Periods selected
Frontend: Dashboard tab shows MY PERFORMANCE KPIs, PAYMENTS section
Frontend: Follow-ups tab shows Action Required and Pipeline Complete sections
Frontend: Data tab shows search, filters (All/SALE/PENDING/LOST), New Lead button
Frontend: Admin All Data tab shows SALESPERSON column
Frontend: Admin Overview shows Company Totals, Equipment Revenue, Accessories
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Backend properly split into modules (database.py, auth.py, models.py, routers/)
Good: Goals router (goals.py) correctly implements POST/GET for goals and comparison endpoint
Good: Period comparison correctly uses filter_leads_by_period for current and previous periods
Good: GoalsTab.jsx correctly displays progress rings with percentage calculations
Good: Delta badges show current vs previous with color-coded indicators (green/red)
Good: Role-based tab visibility implemented correctly in App.js
Good: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Minor: useCallback dependencies warnings in console (does not affect functionality)
seed_data_creation: Test goals created for pay periods: Feb 05-18 (revenue: $75k, deals: 15, commission: $7.5k), Mar 05-18 (revenue: $55,555, deals: 11, commission: $5,555)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Goals & Period Comparison feature fully tested. Backend refactored into modules: database.py, auth.py, models.py, and routers/ directory (auth_routes.py, admin.py, pipeline.py, goals.py). Goals endpoints: POST /api/goals (save), GET /api/goals?pay_period=X (retrieve), GET /api/goals/comparison?pay_period=X (current vs previous + goal). Salesperson role sees Goals tab with progress rings and period comparison deltas. Admin role does NOT see Goals or Follow-ups tabs. All existing features (Dashboard, Follow-ups, Data, Admin Overview/Salespeople/All Data) continue to work correctly.
